mission.title: Runtime Demo Scenario
mission.intent: Show how mission intake, tasking, policy, approval, evidence, SITREP, and AAR connect.

ccir_alerts.label: RED
ccir_alerts.title: deploy_production blocked
ccir_alerts.body: deploy request TR-DEMO-002 targets prod.command-post-dashboard; explicit approval is required before execution.

ccir_alerts.label: PIR
ccir_alerts.title: Evidence interpretation review
ccir_alerts.body: 1 evidence item(s) recorded; separate sourced claim from local interpretation before release.

approvals.label: RED
approvals.risk: Approval AR-DEMO-001 is pending; blocked action must not execute without commander release.
approvals.rollback: Keep prior state and require a new approved FRAGO before execution.

risks.title: Unauthorized action
risks.body: Control: policy gate has blocked 1 high-risk request(s).

risks.title: Context loss
risks.body: Control: current state is rebuilt from event log instead of conversational memory.

risks.title: Pending decision latency
risks.body: Control: 1 pending approval(s) require commander disposition or scoped FRAGO.

tasks.task: Create and validate runtime demo payloads.
tasks.verification: Task order T-DEMO-001; verify against OPORD and SITREP.

evidence.claim: Dashboard state is derived from replayed event log.
evidence.interpretation: Projection-based UI reduces reliance on unstated conversational memory.

sitrep.label: In Progress
sitrep.text: Green request executed; Red deploy request blocked pending approval.

sitrep.label: Next
sitrep.text: Resolve pending approvals, update readiness, and issue FRAGO if scope changes.
